title: 5 Tips for Deploying AI Agents to Production
summary: AWS Developers presents five production deployment best practices for TypeScript AI agents: streaming tool call events for UI responsiveness, layered authentication with OAuth and IAM isolation, type-safe contracted database access with tenant isolation, guardrails with cost budgets and model routing, and comprehensive observability via metrics and distributed tracing. The patterns apply across infrastructure platforms and are demonstrated with the Strands Agents SDK on AWS services.
